sections.title: Infrastructure Tasks
sections.query: project = {prefix} AND type = Task AND sprint in openSprints()

powers.label: Infra Plan
powers.prompt: Create an infrastructure plan for {key} "{summary}". Include resources, configuration, and deployment steps.

sections.title: Open Issues
sections.query: project = {prefix} AND type = Bug AND status != Done

powers.label: Runbook
powers.prompt: Create a runbook for {key} "{summary}". Include diagnosis, resolution, and prevention.
